text:
```python
# Define the 2D list
data = [[1,2],[3,4],[5,6]]

# Use zip to transpose the list and sum each column
column_sums = [sum(col) for col in zip(*data)]

# Print the column-wise sums
print(column_sums)
```

Hint: The `zip(*data)` expression is used to transpose the 2D list, allowing you to iterate over the columns.
